summary: Iteration 23 testing complete. All high-priority bug fixes verified: (1) Specialist modal typing focus loss FIXED - SpecForm now uses own useState, typing 'DrTest' preserved without interruption, (2) Stát dropdown shows only 'Česko' and 'Svět', (3) Legal articles open as full detail pages with 'Zpět na Právní poradnu' back button, (4) Google auth login mode with invalid session returns 401, (5) PWA icons and favicon return 200, (6) Auth login flow works, (7) Homepage shows 'Vítej,' greeting.

feature_test_results.specialist_modal_typing_focus: PASS - Typed 'DrTest' in Jméno field without focus loss - key bug fix verified
feature_test_results.specialist_modal_stat_dropdown: PASS - Only 'Česko' and 'Svět' options as expected
feature_test_results.legal_article_detail_page: PASS - Articles open as full detail page (not accordion)
feature_test_results.legal_article_back_button: PASS - Shows 'Zpět na Právní poradnu' text
feature_test_results.legal_article_back_navigation: PASS - Returns to article list correctly
feature_test_results.google_login_button: PASS - Shows 'Přihlásit se přes Google' on login tab
feature_test_results.google_register_button: PASS - Shows 'Registrovat přes Google' on register tab

critical_code_review_comments: SpecForm component at SpecialistsPage.js lines 122-188 now uses own useState for form data - fixes the focus loss bug
Stát dropdown at lines 168-175 correctly limited to CZ (Česko) and WORLD (Svět)
LegalPage.js selectedArticle state manages detail view rendering at lines 124-156
GoogleCallback.jsx fully rewritten with mode handling and no_account redirect
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 verified all high-priority bug fixes. Key implementations: (1) SpecForm component at SpecialistsPage.js lines 122-188 has its own useState - this fixes the focus loss bug where SpecFormFields was being recreated on every keystroke, (2) Stát dropdown at lines 168-175 shows only CZ/WORLD, (3) LegalPage.js uses selectedArticle state (line 124) for detail view instead of accordion expandedArticle, (4) GoogleCallback.jsx handles mode=login vs mode=register, rejecting no_account with redirect option, (5) LotusIntro animation stays 3.2s (line 15). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_bloom_iteration23.py
